stories.title: Follow live: Mexico closing in on round of 16 bert...
Sources: Raptors near deal to trade for Kawhi
stories.summary: The Clippers have agreed to trade Kawhi Leonard to the Raptors for Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick, unprotected first-round picks in 2031 and 2033, a 2027 first-round pick swap and two second-round picks, sources told ESPN on Tuesday.

stories.title: LeBron tells Lakers he plans to play elsewhere
stories.summary: James has informed the Lakers that the franchise can move on without him because he will play elsewhere, Klutch Sports CEO Rich Paul told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

stories.title: Wizards to shun trade offers for Davis, source say...
stories.summary: The Washington Wizards have no interest in trading All-Star forward Anthony Davis and are not listening to offers for him, a source told Andscape's Marc J. Spears.

stories.title: Pochettino: Bosnia clash like WC 'final' for USMNT...
stories.summary: USMNT coach Mauricio Pochettino said that Wednesday's round-of-32 match against Bosnia-Herzegovina will be like "the final of the World Cup."
